package rulecoverage

func PositiveValidatorOutsideValidationPackage() string {
    ruleID := "validator_outside_validation_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Reusable validators that are scattered across handlers instead of living in a dedicated validation helper package."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
